title: The Grueling Economics of Tennis
title_cn: 网球的残酷经济学
summary: Some of the world’s top tennis players will face off at the Wimbledon finals this weekend. The players who make it to Centre Court have already achieved a bigger feat: a career as a tennis player. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Hannah Miller and The Athletic’s Matt Futterman break down what sets tennis apart from other sports and the challenges the tournaments and players face to stay profitable. (Source: Bloomberg)

Belle Burden’s blockbuster memoir, "Strangers," has riveted readers with the tale of her marriage’s sudden implosion and aftermath.  It has also spurred some of them to open the books on their marital finances.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

The high cost is listed as a factor in why US Soccer can't take the next step on the world stage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束，但协议谈判仍将继续
summary:
President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over.
“The Islamic Republic of Iran has asked us to continue ‘talks.’ We have agreed to do so, but the United States has stated to them, in no uncertain terms, that the Cease Fire is OVER!,” Trump said Friday on social media. Trita Parsi, Executive Vice President at the Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft joined to discuss also saying the track record of the US in the region, particularly in terms of democratizing countries, is abysmal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Eases as US, Iran Continue Talks After Renewed Fighting
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在重新爆发战斗后继续谈判，油价下跌
summary: Oil prices slipped as the US and Iran appear set to continue talks following a flare-up in attacks that strained their ceasefire and deterred tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

title_cn: 特朗普称与伊朗的停火已经结束
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over. James Jeffrey, former US ambassador to Iraq and Turkey, talks about Trump's objectives in Iran and why the US is targeting infrastructure. He speaks on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Won’t Sign Housing Bill But Will Allow It to Become Law
title_cn: 特朗普不会签署住房法案，但会允许其成为法律
summary: President Donald Trump said he would not sign a bipartisan housing bill in protest over lawmakers declining to approve a separate voter-ID bill he has prioritized. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Eases Export Curbs on UAE, Opening Door for AI Chip Sales
title_cn: 美国放宽对阿联酋的出口限制，为人工智能芯片销售打开大门
summary: The Trump administration plans to ease export restrictions on the United Arab Emirates, clearing the way for the Gulf state to buy a broad range of advanced technologies including semiconductors needed to boost its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft
title_cn: 苹果起诉 OpenAI 窃取商业秘密
summary: Apple sued OpenAI for trade secret theft, accusing the artificial intelligence startup and its hardware chief of engaging in a coordinated campaign to steal information about upcoming products. Apple alleges that OpenAI encouraged Apple employees to share information, components, drawings and other materials related to upcoming products. Mark Gurman reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lumen Completes Acquisition of Cloud Networking Firm Alkira
title_cn: Lumen 完成对云网络公司 Alkira 的收购
summary: Chris Stansbury, CFO, of Lumen and Nina Trentmann, Bloomberg News Senior Editor join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily discuss their recent acquisition of Alkira, a cloud-native networking company that helps enterprises manage connectivity across cloud, data center, and edge environments through a single control plane. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft in Blockbuster Case
title_cn: 苹果在重磅案件中起诉 OpenAI 盗窃商业秘密
summary: Apple Inc. sued OpenAI for trade secret theft, accusing the artificial intelligence startup and its hardware chief of engaging in a coordinated campaign to steal information about upcoming products.

title: SK Hynix CEO Expects Memory Crunch to Last Beyond 2030
title_cn: SK 海力士首席执行官预计内存短缺将持续到 2030 年之后
summary: The memory-chip shortages that are roiling the computer, car and device markets will probably persist beyond 2030, according to SK Hynix Inc. Chief Executive Officer Kwak Noh-Jung.

title: SK Hynix Starts Trading on Nasdaq, Opens 14% Above Offer Price | Bloomberg Tech 7/10/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士开始在纳斯达克交易，开盘价较发行价高出 14% |彭博科技 2026 年 7 月 10 日
summary: Ed Ludlow sits down for an interview with SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won from the Nasdaq to discuss SK Hynix's US listing, the biggest-ever by a foreign company. Meanwhile, Bloomberg’s David Gura takes a look at SK Hynix shares as they start trading on the Nasdaq, and dives deeper into the listing's impact on the rest of the US chip sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq President Sees SK Hynix Listing Growing Foreign IPO Pipeline
title_cn: 纳斯达克总裁认为 SK 海力士上市将增加海外 IPO 渠道
summary: Nasdaq President Nelson Griggs says the record-breaking SK Hynix ADR listing is already attracting looks from more foreign companies that may consider US listings. He says JPMorgan Chase struck the right balance on the SK Hynix pricing. Griggs speaks to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow in New York at the Nasdaq.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Promises ‘Much, Much Bigger’ US Investment Plan
title_cn: SK董事长承诺“规模更大”的美国投资计划
summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won, fresh off a landmark US stock offering for the conglomerate’s memory-chip business, said he has an ambitious plan to invest more money in America.

title: SK Hynix ADRs Surge After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
title_cn: SK 海力士 ADR 在美国发行创纪录的 265 亿美元后飙升
summary:
SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts surged above their offering price, after the South Korean memory chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company.

The ADRs opened at $170 each on Friday in New York, versus an offering price of $149 apiece. The successful mega-listing brushed aside concern over recent volatility among chipmakers, demonstrating investors have plenty of appetite for direct exposure to SK Hynix’s dominant position in high-bandwidth memory for artificial intelligence computing. The ADRs are trading at a premium of about 17% over the closing price of the Seoul-listed common stock, due in part to restrictions on exchanging the South Korean stock for the US instruments.

We get reaction from Anthony Hughes, Bloomberg News US ECM Reporter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Chey Tae-won on SK Hynix Debut, AI Demand and US Plans
title_cn: SK 董事长 Chey Tae-won 谈 SK 海力士的首次亮相、人工智能需求和美国计划
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, says they waited a long time to list SK Hynix in the US and calls it a "dream come true." The head of the South Korean chipmaker talks about raising $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company and also discusses the outlook for AI demand and his US investment plans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Payment Firms Emerge as Target in Fight Against Illegal Casinos
title_cn: 支付公司成为打击非法赌场的目标
summary: A trade body for European gambling companies has filed a complaint to the Lithuanian banking regulator seeking an investigation of a payment company that it alleges props up illegal online casinos.

title: Thornburg's Di Zhou Sees Memory Supercycle
title_cn: Thornburg 的周迪看到了记忆超级周期
summary: SK Hynix's US debut is off to a strong start, with its ADRs indicated to open above the offering price. Di Zhou, portfolio manager at Thornburg Investment Management, says, "We're currently in a memory supercycle. Fundamentals are very strong, and SK Hynix is one of the highest-quality pure-play memory companies globally." She speaks on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delayed Xbox Layoffs Leave Employees Scared And Nervous
title_cn: Xbox 延迟裁员让员工感到害怕和紧张
summary: Xbox cut 1,600 jobs this week and plans to cut another 1,600 over the next 12 months, leaving remaining staff on tenterhooks

title: SK Chairman Says He Has 'Much, Much Bigger' Plans for US
title_cn: SK董事长表示他对美国有“更大、更大”的计划
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, discusses his plan  to invest more money in the US. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Says Company May Offer ‘Memory as a Service’
title_cn: SK董事长表示公司可能提供“内存即服务”
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is considering new ways of selling access to its memory chips, including a concept called “memory as a service,” suggesting customers could rent usage from the South Korean company rather than purchasing the actual semiconductors.

title: SK Chairman Has 'Some Confidence' Demand Will Grow
title_cn: SK董事长对需求将会增长“有信心”
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, says customers have been telling him they want the company to expand more. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Builds AI Agents That Beat 60/40 Model in Backtests
title_cn: 摩根大通构建的人工智能代理在回测中击败了 60/40 模型
summary: As investors increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for help with everything from stock picking to risk management, JPMorgan Chase & Co. has been testing whether a model can do something more ambitious: allocate money itself.

title: Government Action is Crucial for AI Entrepreneurs Says Pelgo CEO
title_cn: Pelgo 首席执行官表示，政府行动对人工智能企业家至关重要
summary:
Artificial intelligence could reshape the jobs of nearly 80 million people across Southeast Asia, but there is little sign it has led to large-scale employment cuts, according to the International Labour Organization.
The ILO urged governments to strengthen AI governance and better integrate AI policies through a human-centered approach to help workers and businesses adapt.
Pelgo CEO Chieh Huang discusses how AI is impacting the labor market and how it could serve as a tool for displaced workers rather than a job eliminator. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Bust Fallout Would Be 'More Significant' Than Dot-Com, Says George Noble
title_cn: 乔治·诺布尔 (George Noble) 表示，人工智能泡沫破灭的影响将比互联网泡沫“更严重”
summary:
The US stock market’s rally to new highs has been propelled by so few stocks that it’s reminding some on Wall Street of the runup to the dot-com bubble.
George Noble, Managing Partner of Noble Capital Advisors, discusses the AI trade and how he believes the coming bust would be much worse than the dot-com bubble fallout. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Calls SK Hynix US Debut a 'Dream Come True'
title_cn: SK董事长称SK海力士在美国的首次亮相是“梦想成真”
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, discusses SK Hynix's listing on the Nasdaq and says he hopes to expand the ADR size once there is a good return. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Stocks Are Overbought, Morgan Stanley's Shalett Warns
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的沙利特警告说，半导体股票已超买
summary: Lisa Shalett, Morgan Stanley Wealth Management CIO, discusses the current state of the semiconductor sector, highlighting that chip stocks have become meaningfully overbought with some indexes up nearly 100% year-to-date before recent pullbacks. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Sees Pressure Rising on Chipmakers’ Pricing Power
title_cn: 摩根士丹利认为芯片制造商的定价能力面临越来越大的压力
summary: Morgan Stanley’s Lisa Shalett urged investors to be cautious on chipmakers as evidence mounts that their pricing power is limited, suggesting that the stocks may have rallied too far on optimism around artificial-intelligence spending.

title: A Month After SpaceX IPO, Tesla’s Stock Keeps Holding Its Ground
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股一个月后，特斯拉股价保持坚挺
summary: In the weeks leading up to SpaceX’s monster IPO, many Wall Street pros feared the deal represented an existential threat for Elon Musk’s other giant, Tesla Inc. But after a month in the stock market, the outcome is far from clear.

title: Europe's Space Race | Bloomberg Tech: Europe 7/10/2026
title_cn: 欧洲的太空竞赛|彭博科技：欧洲 7/10/2026
summary:
In this episode of Bloomberg Tech: Europe, Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie launches into Europe's efforts to develop its burgeoning space economy.  SpaceX has shown the might of American space technology - and financial muscle - with its record-breaking IPO. Bloomberg Tech: Europe looks at where Europe is lacking in the space race, and how it can secure space autonomy.

"Bloomberg Tech: Europe" spotlights the biggest names and trends shaping the region's technology ecosystem as the global competition heats up. This monthly, 30-minute magazine-style show features in-depth interviews with top technology leaders, as well as major investors and policymakers - giving you a compelling A to Z of the most consequential innovations, opportunities and challenges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Raytheon, Rheinmetall Anchor AI Training Effort for UK Army
title_cn: 雷神公司和莱茵金属公司为英国陆军提供人工智能训练
summary: The UK Ministry of Defense awarded a £2 billion ($2.7 billion) contract for AI-based military training to a Raytheon-led consortium that includes European defense prime Rheinmetall AG.

title: EU Escalates Meta Probe Over Addictive Design That Hooks Children
title_cn: 欧盟对吸引儿童的成瘾设计升级元调查
summary: The European Union accused Meta Platforms Inc. of using addictive design and disregarding the risks it poses to children, as the bloc ramps up an investigation into the US social media company.

title: Novogratz Morphs Galaxy Into AI Landlord, One Gigawatt at a Time
title_cn: 诺沃格拉茨将银河变成人工智能房东，一次一吉瓦
summary: Mike Novogratz joked he might be ready for another tattoo.

title: Echostar Bulls Say It Offers Traders Discounted SpaceX Exposure
title_cn: 看涨 Echostar 的人士表示，它为交易者提供了 SpaceX 的折扣曝光
summary: SpaceX may finally be within reach for public-market investors, but analysts say there’s a cheaper opportunity to get exposure to shares of the space technology company through EchoStar Corp.

title: Wayve Staff Sold Stock at 10% Discount on Pisces Exchange
title_cn: Wayve 员工在双鱼座交易所以 10% 折扣出售股票
summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd. employees sold shares on London’s new private market at a 10% discount to the self-driving technology startup’s previous valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Demands Iran Declare Strait of Hormuz Open to All Ships
title_cn: 美国要求伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡对所有船只开放
summary: The US is demanding that Iran issue a public statement that all channels of the Strait of Hormuz are open to shipping and that they will not attack transiting civilian vessels, according to senior administration officials.

title: Platner Quits Maine Race as Democrats Seek Quick Replacement
title_cn: 普拉特纳退出缅因州竞选，民主党寻求快速替代者
summary: Graham Platner officially withdrew his US Senate candidacy on Friday, setting up an unprecedented competition among Maine Democrats to replace him.

title: Mali, Algeria Agree to Reopen Airspace After Months of Tensions
title_cn: 马里和阿尔及利亚在数月紧张局势后同意重新开放领空
summary: Mali and Algeria agreed to reopen their airspace to civilian and military aircraft and return ambassadors to their posts, signaling an easing of yearlong tensions between the northern African nations.

title: SK Hynix Climbs in US Debut, CEO Says Memory Crunch to Last |Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/10/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国首次亮相，首席执行官表示内存短缺将持续下去 |彭博商业周刊日报 7/10/2026
summary: Today Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow details his conversation with SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-Jung as the South Korean memory chip maker makes its US debut. Then, Bloomberg White House and Washington correspondent discusses President Trump's dismissal of two Democrat members of the US Election Assistance Commission and the latest from the MidEast. Plus, Bloomberg senior editor Nina Trentmann is joined by Lumen CFO Chris Stansbury on providing AI infrastructure. Finally, Bloomberg 'Business of Sports' Host Vanessa Perdomo-Maglione is joined by Gotham FC governor Carolyn Tisch-Blodgett on the NWSL club's move to Queens and capitalizing on World Cup excitement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democrats Rush to Replace Platner as GOP Relishes Divisions
title_cn: 共和党陷入分裂，民主党人急于更换普拉特纳
summary: Graham Platner’s political demise in Maine has set off a scramble to find a replacement to take on Republican incumbent Senator Susan Collins, with at least eight Democrats entering the wide-open field and less than four months until the November midterms.

title: Here Are the Week’s Winners and Losers
title_cn: 这是本周的赢家和输家
summary: A NATO summit and a World Cup controversy dominated headlines.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over | Balance of Power 7/10/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束权力平衡 7/10/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses the latest from DC. On today's show, former US Ambassador to Iraq James Jeffrey, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft Executive Vice President Trita Parsi. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束，但协议谈判仍将继续
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over. His administration quickly moved to add additional pressure on Tehran.

title: US Sanctions Supreme Leader’s Network as Iran Ceasefire Frays
title_cn: 伊朗停火协议破裂，美国制裁最高领袖网络
summary: The US imposed sanctions on Iranian financier Ali Ansari, accusing him of managing a global network of assets for Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and other senior regime figures, the latest fracture in the truce between Washington and Tehran.

title: Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
title_cn: 特朗普称与伊朗的停火已经结束
summary: James Jeffrey, former US ambassador to Iraq and Turkey, said a new US blockade of Iran and bombing of its railways would cripple Iran's economy and military capabilities. President Trump says the ceasefire is over, but both sides are still talking. Jeffrey speaks on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senators Say They Have Deal With Trump on Russia Sanctions Bill
title_cn: 参议员表示他们与特朗普就俄罗斯制裁法案达成协议
summary: A bipartisan group of senators said they have an agreement with the Trump administration to move ahead with new Russian sanctions legislation, raising the prospect of more US economic pressure on the Kremlin to halt its war in Ukraine.

title: Mexico Readies $4 Billion in Financing to Back Energy Projects
title_cn: 墨西哥准备提供 40 亿美元融资支持能源项目
summary: Mexican finance officials are exploring the possibility of creating an umbrella-financing package for renewable-energy projects that could be supported by more than $4 billion from development bank Banco Nacional de Obras y Servicios Publicos, the bank’s head said.

title: The Shattering of the Middle East’s Most Unlikely Friendship
title_cn: 中东最不可能的友谊的破裂
summary: Israeli tech titan Eyal Waldman and Palestinian tycoon Bashar Masri were best pals. The Hamas attack and Israel’s response made them bitter enemies.

title: Here’s Who Could Replace Graham Platner on the Maine Ballot
title_cn: 谁可以取代缅因州选票上的格雷厄姆·普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrat Graham Platner’s withdrawal from the race for a US Senate seat unleashed a scramble by a handful of candidates who have little time to build support ahead of a convention the party is planning before a July 27 deadline to confirm a name on the ballot.

title: New York City Stares Down a Care Crisis as Haitian TPS Ends
title_cn: 海地 TPS 结束后纽约市面临护理危机
summary: The end of US work authorizations for hundreds of thousands of Haitians is threatening to leave short-staffed nursing homes, hospitals and home-care agencies with even fewer caregivers.

title: UK Police Arrest Man on Suspicion of Murdering Former Minister
title_cn: 英国警方逮捕涉嫌谋杀前部长的男子
summary: UK police arrested a man on suspicion of the murder of the fomer minister and Reform UK politician Ann Widdecombe, who was found dead on Thursday morning at her home in Devon, southwest England.

title: Top Senate Democrats Call for Probes Into Trump Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 参议院民主党高层呼吁调查特朗普的加密货币收入
summary: A group of high-ranking Senate Democrats Friday called on their Republican counterparts to investigate whether President Donald Trump’s crypto ventures pose national security risks.

title: Mexico, Peru Open Door To Restoring Relations After Bitter Political Fight
title_cn: 墨西哥和秘鲁在激烈的政治斗争后打开恢复关系的大门
summary: Keiko Fujimori’s looming inauguration as Peru’s next president is opening a path to repair the Andean nation’s relationship with Mexico, after Lima broke off diplomatic relations last year.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Two Russian Refineries, Slew of Fuel Tankers
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯两家炼油厂和大量油罐车
summary: Ukraine said it hit two Russian refineries and over a dozen fuel tankers, the latest in a series of attacks on energy assets that are deepening a nationwide fuel crunch.

title: Congo Tax Agency Seals Glencore Mine Offices in Payment Dispute
title_cn: 刚果税务局因付款纠纷查封嘉能可矿山办事处
summary: Tax authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo sealed off offices belonging to a Glencore Plc-owned copper mine, escalating a row over payments allegedly owed to the state.

title: DHS to Create Its Own Airline for Round-The-Clock Deportations
title_cn: 国土安全部将创建自己的航空公司，提供全天候驱逐出境服务
summary: The US government is moving ahead with plans to create its own fleet of government-owned aircraft to bolster deportations.

title: Iran Supreme Leader to Hold Memorial Ceremony for Slain Father
title_cn: 伊朗最高领袖将为遇害父亲举行追悼会
summary: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will hold a memorial ceremony for his predecessor and father Ali Khamenei on Friday, his office said, sparking speculation that the Islamic Republic’s top official could make his first public appearance since the war.

title: Qatar Blocks Defense Joint Venture Between VW, Israeli Firm
title_cn: 卡塔尔阻止大众与以色列公司之间的国防合资企业
summary: Qatar’s sovereign wealth fund vetoed a deal for Volkswagen AG to make vehicles supporting Israel’s Iron Dome mobile air-defense system, a plan intended to save hundreds of jobs at one of the German car manufacturer’s sites.

title: Reform UK Decries ‘Smear Campaign’ After Fresh Finance Probe Report
title_cn: 改革英国谴责新金融调查报告后的“抹黑运动”
summary: Reform UK’s deputy leader Richard Tice said his party was being subjected to a “smear campaign” after a newspaper reported that London police are investigating a £500,000 ($671,000) donation.

title: Trump Won’t Sign Housing Bill But Will Allow It to Become Law
title_cn: 特朗普不会签署住房法案，但将允许其成为法律
summary: President Donald Trump said he would not sign a bipartisan housing bill in protest over lawmakers declining to approve a separate voter-ID bill he has prioritized.

title: Hungary Unveils Agency to Recover Lost Orban-Era Assets
title_cn: 匈牙利成立机构以追回丢失的欧尔班时代资产
summary: Hungary’s government unveiled plans for a new investigative authority with the power to prosecute suspects and recover misappropriated public assets, fulfilling one of Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s key anti-corruption pledges.

title: German Lawmakers Approve Health Bill With Drug-Price Cuts
title_cn: 德国立法者批准医疗法案并降低药品价格
summary: German lawmakers approved a comprehensive overhaul of the country’s statutory health-insurance system that forces drug-price reductions on pharmaceutical companies as part of a wider drive to cut billions of euros in costs.

title: Erdogan’s NATO Gift of Revolvers Runs Into Europe’s Gun Laws
title_cn: 埃尔多安向北约赠送的左轮手枪违反欧洲枪支法
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan’s parting gift to the NATO leaders he hosted this week was a revolver, and an accidental exposé of squeamish European attitudes to firearms.

title: Turkey, Egypt Block LGBTQ Cruise Entry Over ‘Moral Values’
title_cn: 土耳其、埃及以“道德价值观”为由阻止 LGBTQ 邮轮入境
summary: Turkey and Egypt have blocked a cruise ship carrying more than 1,900 LGBTQ tourists from entering their ports, with the former citing a supposed threat to Turkish society.
